erp_default_line_item_type_id.description: ERP Line Item Type ID (Cost Type). Company must also be ERP integrated

equipment_default_line_item_type_id.description: Line Item Type ID (Cost Type) for equipment timecards entries.

equipment_erp_default_line_item_type_id.description: Line Item Type ID (Cost Type) for equipment timecards entries. Company must also be ERP integrated

has_backfilled.description: Whether the default Line Item Type ID has been backfilled to Timecard Entries

apply_to_existing.description: Whether the passed in Line Item Type ID should be applied to existing timecard entries (erp or not)
